calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted, except for $100 per pay period. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
